diagnostics_hook:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(head -c 65536); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
[[ "$FILE" != *.svelte ]] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
if command -v svelte-check >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  ERRORS=$(npx svelte-check --threshold warning 2>&1 | tail -15)
  [ -n "$ERRORS" ] && echo "$ERRORS" >&2
fi
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
notes: Use svelte-check (ships with svelte-language-tools) for project-wide diagnostics.
